channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling, 14th April
item.description:
Constant dog fouling around Alfred fagon apartments that never gets cleaned up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 14th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craig Park Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left on floor 4, 14th April
item.description:
Flat 241 on 4th floor was emptied yesterday and this sofa was left outside on the landing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Square, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The low bridge sign is facing the wrong way, 14th April
item.description:
The low bridge sign referring to Tudor Way railway bridge is turned sideways, therefore not visible to HGVs driving down the Queensway towards Tudor Way. It needs to be turned 90 degrees so the oncoming traffic can see it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another bollard come out of ground outside 125B Southborough Lane, 14th April
item.description:
Reported one bollard which the council have placed hoarding around and now a second bollard has been knocked over and is out of the ground and has damaged the pavement. It is both unsightly and a hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Play equipment issue, 14th April
item.description:
The roundabout (picture attached) is no longer spinning - it’s completely jammed up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Restons Crescent, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 14th April
item.description:
Graffiti on grey utility box. See photo. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car declared SORN but on roaf, 14th April
item.description:
Abandoned car not moved since November 2025 when MOT expired Declared SORN but parked on road. Can see it’s mouldy on the inside and clearly not being used. I’ve digitally removed the rear number plate as rules say to not include pics of number plates

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gossington Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table left at passageway linking Dickson Road and Sandby Green, 14th April
item.description:
The table was abandoned on our garden hedge.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dickson Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noisy Defective Drain Cover on Sth. Lambeth Road, SW8., 14th April
item.description:
Drain cover has become loose or cracked. Causes noise when vehicles pass over it. In direction of Stockwell, in front of flats at SW8 1TP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Lambeth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish flowing out onto the pavement, 14th April
item.description:
Rubbish on the pavement all over floor
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box and plastic lid dumped on elcot avenue, 14th April
item.description:
Please take these items away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandons van, 14th April
item.description:
The van has been there unmoved for over 4 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Street, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 14th April
item.description:
Overflowing recycling bins and waste on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trailer and untaxed car, 14th April
item.description:
This trailer has been chained to the lamp post causing a trip hazard for well over a year and is now becoming unsightly. The trailer is also blocking the view of oncoming cars when turning in from Plaistow Lane causing an ongoing safety concern for residents. This has been going on for far too long without being sorted out. For over 8 months it sat there with no licence plates, no tax or mot, and it needs to be addressed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged vehicle, 14th April
item.description:
Damaged vehicle in non roadworthy conditions

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pretoria Road North, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped refrigerator and rubbish, 14th April
item.description:
Dumped fridge and rubbish bags by electrical substation

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Commercial Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle appears to be abandoned, 14th April
item.description:
Vehicle has been parked outside No. 12 Albion Terrace for around 3 months. It appears to be used for storing goods, is packed to capacity and is very unsightly. Resident at No. 12 is unable to park his own vehicle there as the subject vehicle is never mov

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previous reported dumped sofa moved playground entrace, 14th April
item.description:
Sofa dumped outside entrance to playground, was previously reported as dumped on balconey ref 9284294 and reported as fixed by council after being left for 2 days but was actually dumped somewhere else on the estate instead, this is not how you fix a fly tipping issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, East Surrey Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos tiles illegally dumped on street, 14th April
item.description:
Earlier today a builder’s sack containing asbestos tiles, roofing felt and other waste was dumped near my home (67 Southwold Road, E5 9PH) at the access point to my address and Radley Square, off Dudlington Road behind the emergency access gate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dudlington Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
